properties.name: app.jwtSecret
properties.description: Secret key (Base64 encoded) for signing JWT tokens

properties.name: app.jwtExpirationMs
properties.description: JWT token expiration time in milliseconds

properties.name: app.jwtRefreshExpirationMs
properties.description: JWT refresh token expiration time in milliseconds

properties.name: app.oauth2.authorizedRedirectUri
properties.description: Authorized redirect URIs for OAuth2 login

properties.name: spring.flyway.baseline-on-migrate
properties.description: Whether to automatically call baseline when migrate is executed against a non-empty schema with no metadata table
